title: Fluid Dynamics (3FD)
outline: Applications, description of fluids, equations of fluid flow for simple fluids, and analytical techniques.
lecture_times: Monday and Tuesday, meridian. Thursday, 5th period.
dp_requirements: A class record of 30% or more; attendance of both 75% of all lectures and 75% of all tutorials.
assessment: Class record counts up to 50%; the balance is made up by the final examination.
